data.title: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson unveils shift in 2025 development model
data.description:
Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson has announced a shift in the development model of the project for 2025. The new approach will introduce agile engineering teams whose aim is to achieve a faster execution of the platform’s development goals. According to the update, the key milestone for these teams will be the delivery of the Ouroboros […]

data.title: XRP Whales Are Back – 880 Million Tokens Accumulated This Month
data.description:
XRP is now trading above the $2. 35 mark, gaining momentum as bulls aim to break through critical resistance on the way to a potential all-time high. This move comes as the broader crypto market enters a new bullish phase, with Bitcoin soaring past $100K and Ethereum reclaiming the $2,200 zone in a sharp rally. XRP, long viewed as lagging behind majors, now shows notable relative strength compared to other altcoins
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ripple/xrp-whales-are-back-880-million-tokens-accumulated-this-month/

data.title: Michael Saylor Advocates for Bitcoin's Role in Global Empires
data.description: According to Foresight News, Strategy founder Michael Saylor recently tweeted that "every empire needs Bitcoin." His statement was accompanied by an image from the Star Wars franchise.

data.title: The whale transferred 7078 ETH to OKX after 3 months, with a floating loss of about 1.49 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnchainLens monitoring, the whale address became active again after 3 months, transferring 7,078 ETH to OKX, with a total value of approximately US$17.2 million at the current price. The address faces a floating loss of approximately US$1.49 million in this operation.

data.title: $2,950,000 Enters Fraudulent Accounts at JPMorgan Chase, Wells Fargo, Bank of America and BBVA in Million-Dollar Romance and Money Laundering Scheme: Report
data.description:
A man living in Phoenix, Arizona is heading to prison after allegedly using fraudulent accounts at JPMorgan Chase, Wells Fargo, Bank of America and BBVA to launder millions of dollars. Investigators say US resident and Nigerian citizen Kingsley Ibhadore stole nearly $3 million in a romance scheme targeting multiple women, reports FOX 10 Phoenix.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/09/man-deposits-2950000-into-fraudulent-accounts-at-jpmorgan-chase-wells-fargo-bank-of-america-and-bbva-in-lucrative-money-laundering-scheme-report/

data.title: California Governor Criticizes U.S. Tariff Policies
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, California Governor Gavin Newsom recently criticized the U.S. federal government's tariff policies in a video posted on social media. He argued that the current tariff measures could jeopardize the United States' status as the world's largest economy. Newsom highlighted that these policies are hindering imports, which directly affects the daily lives of ordinary citizens. He warned that in a few months, there could be shortages of school backpacks and Christmas toys, exacerbating the financial burden on American families.

Newsom emphasized California's significant role in the global economy as the most economically powerful state in the U.S. He attributed this to California's commitment to reducing trade barriers and providing quality services to American consumers. However, he expressed concern that the current tariff policies are undermining these efforts, leading to rising prices and port congestion.

data.title: In volatile markets, RWAs like gold are a lifeline
data.description:
Opinion by: Kevin Rusher, founder of RAACIt’s a volatile world out there. This year, we’ve seen stocks take a wild ride as gold has pumped and crypto has been caught somewhere in the middle. Investors have dumped risk assets and scrambled for safe havens. Gold is leading the charge
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/in-volatile-markets-rwas-like-gold-are-a-lifeline?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
